_comment: Trunk-based default-branch protection ruleset for climasite (adoption Phase B). SERVER-SIDE source of truth + the REAL merge gate. RECONCILED to climasite's CI: the required context is 'Test Summary' — the existing aggregator job that needs[] every gate (Unit/Integration/Frontend/Build/E2E/Lint&Format/Dependency-Audit/ADR/Test-Design/Coverage/PR-Checklist), so a green Test Summary on the merge_group run means all gates passed. (The vault template's integration/e2e/a11y/perf-budget contexts don't exist as standalone climasite jobs; a11y+Lighthouse are reporting-first, not gating.) Apply EVALUATE first, flip to active only after a green merge_group run: gh api --method POST repos/byrzohod/climasite/rulesets --input <(jq '.enforcement="evaluate"' this-file). test.yml MUST keep 'merge_group: types:[checks_requested]' in on: or the queue stalls. 0 required approvals keeps AI auto-merge (PROC-01 decision). This supersedes the classic branch protection once active.
name: trunk-default-branch-protection
